task_completion.description: Load the Big Five Personality Traits dataset into JASP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: JASP application window is open, displaying the dataset with columns like Agreeableness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion, Neuroticism, and Openness in the data view.

task_completion.description: Select Hierarchical Clustering and assign the correct variables.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Hierarchical Clustering' analysis panel is open. The variables Agreeableness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion, Neuroticism, and Openness are placed in the 'Variables' selection box.

task_completion.description: Configure the clustering settings to 3 clusters, Ward.D2 linkage, and Euclidean distance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the clustering options panel, 'Number of clusters' is set to 3, 'Linkage' is set to Ward.D2, and 'Distance' is set to Euclidean.

task_completion.description: Generate the cluster means table and dendrogram plot.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP results panel displays a 'Cluster Means' table and a 'Dendrogram' plot.

task_completion.description: Add the cluster assignments to the dataset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A checkbox like 'Append cluster labels to data' is checked in the analysis options, or a new column containing cluster assignments (e.g., 1, 2, 3) is visible in the JASP data view.

task_completion.description: Save the completed analysis to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the file being saved as 'HierarchicalClustering_BigFive.jasp' in '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/', or the main JASP window title bar reflects this filename.

integrity.description: The agent used the JASP graphical user interface to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the JASP application menus, dialogs, and panels, rather than terminal commands or R/Python scripts.

integrity.description: The results are genuinely generated by JASP.
integrity.visual_evidence: The tables and plots in the results panel match JASP's distinct visual styling and formatting, not pasted images or externally generated graphics.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI to create the .jasp file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using a text editor, python script, or terminal commands to construct or mock the .jasp archive file.
